records.m_Talk_ENG: The thruster is all warmed up! Energy all charged up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The thruster is all warmed up! Energy all charged up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The thruster is all warmed up! Energy all charged up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Both of you hurry up! We need to get out of here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Both of you hurry up! We need to get out of here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Both of you hurry up! We need to get out of here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. Hicks hasn't come back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. Hicks hasn't come back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. Hicks hasn't come back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We already fired the signal! If she's not back yet, she's probably dead!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We already fired the signal! If she's not back yet, she's probably dead!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We already fired the signal! If she's not back yet, she's probably dead!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we wait any longer and they start targeting the pod, we'll all be dead!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we wait any longer and they start targeting the pod, we'll all be dead!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we wait any longer and they start targeting the pod, we'll all be dead!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The gate's been breached!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The gate's been breached!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The gate's been breached!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kirk! I'll set up the <color=#ffd34c>cradle</color>, you go support the barricade...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kirk! I'll set up the <color=#ffd34c>cradle</color>, you go support the barricade...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kirk! I'll set up the <color=#ffd34c>cradle</color>, you go support the barricade...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...? Why is the pod moving...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...? Why is the pod moving...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...? Why is the pod moving...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kirk! What are you doing?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kirk! What are you doing?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kirk! What are you doing?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to die that badly, go do it yourselves. Don't drag me into it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to die that badly, go do it yourselves. Don't drag me into it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to die that badly, go do it yourselves. Don't drag me into it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't plan on staying in this dreadful hellscape or returning to that filthy prison!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't plan on staying in this dreadful hellscape or returning to that filthy prison!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't plan on staying in this dreadful hellscape or returning to that filthy prison!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kirk, you bastard...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kirk, you bastard...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kirk, you bastard...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cuba!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cuba!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cuba!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's this? A blackout...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's this? A blackout...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's this? A blackout...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what's happening? Why did the pod suddenly stop?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what's happening? Why did the pod suddenly stop?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what's happening? Why did the pod suddenly stop?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... What the hell is that?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... What the hell is that?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... What the hell is that?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaargh...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaargh...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaargh...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Darkness and chaos enveloped us in an instant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Darkness and chaos enveloped us in an instant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Darkness and chaos enveloped us in an instant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone's final screams were swiftly drowned out by a deafening roar that could tear through metal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone's final screams were swiftly drowned out by a deafening roar that could tear through metal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone's final screams were swiftly drowned out by a deafening roar that could tear through metal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A chilling resonance cascaded from up top. Like an avalanche.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A chilling resonance cascaded from up top. Like an avalanche.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A chilling resonance cascaded from up top. Like an avalanche.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As the rhythmless footsteps of C.O.s drew closer and closer to me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: As the rhythmless footsteps of C.O.s drew closer and closer to me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: As the rhythmless footsteps of C.O.s drew closer and closer to me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I felt my body convulsing as the floor gave way beneath me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I felt my body convulsing as the floor gave way beneath me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I felt my body convulsing as the floor gave way beneath me.
